name: RAG Active Call - Phase 2 Retrieval Gate

assignments.name: user_query
assignments.value: Phase 2 test: can n8n confirm Qdrant is ready before retrieval?

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_transactions (
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  incoming_message_ts,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_name }}',
  '{{ $json.author_id_hash }}',
  now(),
  'active_call',
  'created',
  'not_started',
  'not_started',
  '{{ $json.user_query }}'
)
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  created_at,
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES
(
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'discord.event_received',
  'Set Manual Active Call',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'discord_message_id', '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
    'channel_id', '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
    'channel_name', '{{ $json.channel_name }}'
  )
),
(
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'routing.active_call',
  'Create Transaction',
  'decision',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'route_type', '{{ $json.route_type }}',
    'reason', 'manual_phase_2_retrieval_gate_test'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET normalized_query = '{{ $json.normalized_query }}'
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}';

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'query.normalized',
  'Normalize Query',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'normalized_query', '{{ $json.normalized_query }}',
    'query_prefix', 'search_query:'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'qdrant.collection_check',
  'Check Qdrant Collection',
  'decision',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'qdrant_collection', '{{ $json.qdrant_collection }}',
    'qdrant_status_code', {{ $json.qdrant_status_code || 0 }},
    'collection_exists', {{ $json.collection_exists }},
    'points_count', {{ $json.points_count || 0 }},
    'collection_ready', {{ $json.collection_ready }},
    'min_result_count', {{ $json.min_result_count || 0 }},
    'retrieval_score_threshold', {{ $json.retrieval_score_threshold || 0 }},
    'retrieval_decision', '{{ $json.retrieval_decision }}',
    'phase_2_result', '{{ $json.phase_2_result }}'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Gate Decision")[0].json.next_status }}',
  retrieval_status = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Gate Decision")[0].json.next_retrieval_status }}',
  response_status = 'not_posted',
  refusal_reason = NULLIF('{{ $items("Build Retrieval Gate Decision")[0].json.refusal_reason }}', ''),
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Gate Decision")[0].json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'transaction.phase_2_gate_completed',
  'Finalize Phase 2 Gate',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'status', '{{ $json.status }}',
    'retrieval_status', '{{ $json.retrieval_status }}',
    'response_status', '{{ $json.response_status }}',
    'refusal_reason', '{{ $json.refusal_reason }}',
    'latency_ms', {{ $json.latency_ms || 0 }}
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id, event_name;

SELECT
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms
FROM rag_transactions
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}';

SELECT
  event_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload,
  created_at
FROM rag_trace_events
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;
